mapper.sql: select id, book_id, title, content, chapter_no, sort_order, is_free, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from osh_book_chapter
mapper.select: where book_id = #{bookId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
select id, title, chapter_no, sort_order, is_free from osh_book_chapter where book_id = #{bookId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, chapter_no asc
select max(chapter_no) from osh_book_chapter where book_id = #{bookId} and del_flag = '0'
